## Design Context

### Users

Startup founders evaluating an AI venture studio partner. They are typically scanning quickly on desktop/mobile to judge capability, speed, and trustworthiness.

### Brand Personality

Clean, professional, and credible. Tone should feel practical, confident, and execution-focused.

### Aesthetic Direction

Light-mode-first visual system with restrained contrast, generous whitespace, and illustration-led storytelling. Favor clarity over decoration and avoid overly playful or flashy patterns.

### Design Principles

1. Prioritize visual comprehension first, copy second.
2. Use one consistent illustration language across sections.
3. Keep hierarchy simple with fewer words and stronger section focal points.
4. Preserve a professional tone through restrained color and motion.
5. Maintain mobile readability with clear spacing and alignment.
